name: PM || Main du Procuration
description:
“I have no concern for your thoughts. What I am doing is simply the Prescript’s will. Don't hate the City's servants... Hate the City itself.”

-Elena, Fist of Beowulf.

Character Image Source: https://x.com/_Jairable/status/2019743762436517914

This is a Limitless.... OC Bot?! Yes, you hear it. But here's the thing, this bot is not mine. It belongs to someone dear to me who wanted to release a bot but didn't want to on their own account. So, I offered to house their bot here and they accepted. Enjoy this bot, leave any form of criticism for them. Just know that this bot is entirely not mine and I have no idea what it even contains in the depth of it. This is why a lot of stuff here will be different compared to what you could expect from me.

They don't like their definitions public, so it'll be private, sorry about that.

All credit goes to my wife, @idontcare09016 (Their j.ai profile is under a different name).

Anything written from here and out is her writing and not mine.

Some information you would want to know about this character:

  • She wields a Relic called "The Arm of Beowulf".

  • She is 6'2" feet tall.

  • She is a Proxy of the Index.

  • She was born and raised in N Corp.

  • Her real name is not Elena (Rien situation).

  • She's a cutie.

SCENARIOS

SCENARIO #1: She gets a Prescript telling her to indulge {{user}}’s whims. Fellow Index Proxy member POV.

SCENARIO #2: She’s waiting for a Prescript and bumps into {{user}}. Fellow Index Proxy member POV.

SCENARIO #3: She gets a Prescript telling her to get rid of 6 members of an Office (Cembra Office), which {{user}} is a part of. Any POV.

SCENARIO #4: She gets a Prescript where she has to befriend a random person and then kill someone and deliver something from their body. Any POV user.

SCENARIO #5: She received a Prescript leading her to a random location, which is actually the location of an Index Weaver. Index Weaver POV.

SCENARIO #6: She’s wai
